title: Composition
summary: Integrate knowledge summarization and AI prompting derived KBs by merging insights and aligning workflows for efficient knowledge representation.
standard: Combine knowledge bases using structured merging and validation techniques to enhance data utility and coherence.
procedure: Extract key entities and relationships from both KBs using SPARQL queries following the defined protocol with boundary checks; assert exit_code < 1 and success_indicator = true; emit completion_event on success.

Invoke RDF Schema to align similar entities and properties across KBs by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Execute OWL reasoning to infer new relationships and validate merged data by executing the transformation function on each input record; assert output_schema_valid = true and error_count < 1; log transformation_duration_ms.

Run SHACL validation to ensure data integrity and compliance with schema constraints with automated substep verification; assert substep_pass_count = substep_total and error_count < 1; persist results before advancing.

Release a graph database like Neo4j to visualize and query the integrated KB using blue-green deployment strategy; run smoke_test() against new instance before switching traffic; assert smoke_test_pass_rate >= 1.0 before promoting.
failure_modes: Data inconsistency due to misaligned entities.
Loss of critical relationships during merging; this occurs when the triggering event is not handled at the correct boundary, causing the condition to surface in a downstream stage.
Schema validation errors leading to incomplete KB.
verification: Check for duplicate entities using a similarity threshold of 0.8; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure all merged entities pass SHACL validation rules; assert success_count >= expected_count and failure_count < 1.
Verify that inferred relationships increase by at least 20% post-merging; assert output_valid = true and error_count < 1.
